basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Faculty Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has published the YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. JNCAO/No.09/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow position. Candidates aged up to 35 years and holding a PhD or equivalent degree (MD/MS/DM/MCh/MPH with relevant postdoctoral experience) are eligible to apply through email mode. The application process is open and will remain active until 15-07-2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and applica

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 15-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD or equivalent degree (MD/MS/DM/MCh/MPH with relevant postdoctoral experience)
qualification.details: PhD or equivalent degree (MD/MS/DM/MCh/MPH with relevant postdoctoral experience)

salary_details.pay_scale: Equivalent to the entry-level Ramanujan Fellowship of the ANRF, Government of India
salary_details.details: Equivalent to the entry-level Ramanujan Fellowship of the ANRF, Government of India.

selection_process: Research seminar(s) Pedagogic lecture(s) Interactions with faculty members Interview by a search and selection committee
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JNCASR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JNCASR YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PhD or equivalent degree (MD/MS/DM/MCh/MPH with relevant postdoctoral experience)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 15-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Equivalent to the entry-level Ramanujan Fellowship of the ANRF, Government of India.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Research seminar(s) Pedagogic lecture(s) Interactions with faculty members Interview by a search and selection committee

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications via email is 15-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD or an equivalent degree, which includes MD/MS/DM/MCh/MPH with relevant postdoctoral experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years as of 15-07-2026.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes research seminars, pedagogic lectures, interactions with faculty members, and an interview by a search and selection committee.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary is equivalent to the entry-level Ramanujan Fellowship of the ANRF, Government of India.

faq.question: Q7. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the YRGCARE-Suniti Solomon Distinguished Faculty Fellow post.

faq.question: Q10. Where is JNCASR located?
faq.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka.
